summary: Frontend testing of 3 dashboard pages (Dashboard/Sales Overview, Target x SKU, Target x Resource) with contemporary theme. All pages successfully verified with gradient backgrounds, glass-morphism effects, 4 summary stat cards, functional filters, sortable tables, and proper styling.
passed_tests: Dashboard (Sales Overview) - /dashboard: Page loads with data-testid='sales-overview-dashboard', gradient background, glass-morphism filter card, 4 activity stat cards (Visits, Calls, New Leads, Pipeline Value), Lead Status Distribution grid, Won/Lost summary cards
Dashboard Filters: Time Period, Territory, State, City, Sales Resource dropdowns all functional, Reset button works

Target x SKU - /target-sku: Page loads with data-testid='target-sku-report', gradient background, glass-morphism table, 4 summary stat cards (Total Target, Total Achieved, TBD Revenue, Achievement %), Download CSV button
Target x SKU Filters: 4 in-line table filters (Target Name, Territory, City, SKU) work correctly, 9 sortable columns

Target x Resource - /target-resource: Page loads with data-testid='target-resource-report', gradient background, glass-morphism table, 4 summary stat cards (Total Target, Total Achieved, TBD Revenue, Avg Achievement)
Target x Resource Filters: 4 in-line table filters (Target Name, Territory, City, Resource) work correctly, 10 sortable columns
Target x Resource Achievement %: Color-coded achievement percentages verified (emerald >=100%, blue >=75%, amber >=50%, red <50%)
Sidebar Navigation: Navigation between all dashboard pages works correctly via sidebar menu
critical_code_review_comments: Contemporary theme applied consistently across all 3 pages
Glass-morphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl) used on filter cards and tables
Gradient backgrounds match home dashboard theme (from-slate-50 via-white to-[color]-50/30)
Stat cards have colored gradient accents at top and matching icons
data-testid attributes present: sales-overview-dashboard, target-sku-report, target-resource-report
Proper hover states and transitions on table rows and cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard reports contemporary theme successfully applied to 3 additional pages: Dashboard (Sales Overview), Target x SKU, Target x Resource. Routes: /dashboard, /target-sku, /target-resource. All pages use real API endpoints (no mocked data). Achievement % column on Target x Resource uses color-coding based on percentage thresholds.

theme_verification.gradient_backgrounds: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-white to-[color]-50/30 (teal for Dashboard, violet for Target x SKU, indigo for Target x Resource)
theme_verification.glass_morphism: backdrop-blur-xl on filter cards and tables
theme_verification.stat_cards: 4 cards per page with colored gradient accents and matching icons
theme_verification.tables: Clean styling with hover states, sortable headers, and in-line filters
